ogTitle: Cumbandry vs Cumberland Reach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cumbandry and Cumberland Reach.
heading: Cumbandry vs Cumberland Reach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumbandry, New South Wales and Cumberland Reach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cumberland Reach has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Cumbandry (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumbandry or Cumberland Reach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumbandry has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Cumberland Reach scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumbandry scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Cumberland Reach scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumbandry or Cumberland Reach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cumberland Reach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
